author: raoatifshad
body:
#### PR description:
This PR removes unnecessary static storage from the local vstart and vstep arrays in LASBarrelAlgorithm::CalculateParameters(). These arrays are initialized on every invocation and are only used within the function scope.
function 'LASBarrelAlgorithm::CalculateParameters'
accesses or modifies non-const static local variable '_vstart'.
```[cms.FunctionChecker]
Non-const variable 'float[52] _vstart'
is static local or static member data and might be thread-unsafe
[threadsafety.StaticLocal]
function 'LASBarrelAlgorithm::CalculateParameters'
accesses or modifies non-const static local variable '_vstep'.
[cms.FunctionChecker]
Non-const variable 'float[52] _vstep'
is static local or static member data and might be thread-unsafe
[threadsafety.StaticLocal]
```
[logs here](https://cmssdt.cern.ch/SDT/jenkins-artifacts/ib-static-analysis/CMSSW_20_1_X_2026-07-10-1100/el9_amd64_gcc13/build-logs/Alignment/LaserAlignment/log.html)

Does this approach look acceptable to you, or would you prefer a different solution (e.g. keeping them static const or constexpr)?
title: [WarningFix]Alignment/LaserAlignment: remove unnecessary static local
